title: psychotria pumila var. leuconeura
intro: Psychotria pumila var. leuconeura, also known as the dwarf psychotria, is a variety of the Psychotria genus of flowering plants native to the tropical forests of Southeast Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Psychotria pumila var. leuconeura include reducing inflammation, improving immune function, and protecting against oxidative stress, making it a potential remedy for various health conditions. Traditionally, the plant is prepared by infusing the leaves in hot water to make a tea, which is consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
